prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `60c09cac`.
codex_response:
Implemented `60c09cac` as a new ARC2 task package. The rule is an exact `2x` pixel expansion: every input cell, including `0`, becomes a `2x2` block of the same color. I used the summary hint because both summary files matched the official examples.

The verifier is minimal and RE-ARC-style, and the generator stays in-family by producing small zero-background grids with `1-3` colors and a few sparse connected motifs, including repeated colors across separate motifs so disconnected same-color fragments can occur like in the originals. No new primitive was needed.

Verification passed: official examples `3/3`, generated examples `1000/1000`, and I visually checked `[preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/60c09cac/previews/preview_01.png)` against `[originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/60c09cac/previews/originals.png)`.
